title: Movie Genre Classification
scenario:
Write a short paragraph describing a movie as 'action', 'romance', or 'comedy' based on its plot.
A movie is considered an 'action' film if it has a lot of violence or intense scenes, a 'romance' film if it focuses on relationships and love, and a 'comedy' film if it is humorous and light-hearted.
For example: 'The Avengers is an action movie.'

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the text meets the character limit and classification requirement
Verify the tone of the text is informative and neutral
Check if the classification is correct based on the given plot characteristics
